mapper.sql: id, username, password, student_no, real_name, phone, email, class_id, status, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: select from sys_user where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
select from sys_user where username = #{username} and deleted = 0 limit 1
select from sys_user where student_no = #{studentNo} and deleted = 0 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user(username, password, student_no, real_name, phone, email, class_id, status, create_time, update_time, deleted) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{studentNo}, #{realName}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{classId}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: update sys_user set username = #{username}, password = #{password}, student_no = #{studentNo}, real_name = #{realName}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, class_id = #{classId}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
update sys_user set deleted = 1, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select from sys_user where deleted = 0 and id in
#{id}

select from sys_user u where u.deleted = 0 and u.status = 1 and exists ( select 1 from sys_user_role ur inner join sys_role r on r.id = ur.role_id and r.deleted = 0 where ur.deleted = 0 and ur.user_id = u.id and r.role_code = 'STUDENT' )
and (u.username like concat('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') or u.real_name like concat('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') or u.student_no like concat('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))
and u.class_id = #{query.classId}
and exists ( select 1 from class_info c where c.deleted = 0 and c.status = 1 and c.id = u.class_id and c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} )
order by u.id asc
